source.business_scenario: rental ↔ inventory NL(staff_id 无索引时)
source.redaction_notes: Synthetic Pagila schema; no real customer data

input.sql:
SELECT r.rental_id, i.film_id, i.store_id
FROM rental r
INNER JOIN inventory i ON r.inventory_id = i.inventory_id
WHERE r.staff_id = 1
LIMIT 10
input.explain_output:

-- @target: JOIN-001
-- @severity: warning
-- @scenario: rental ↔ inventory NL(staff_id 无索引时)
SELECT r.rental_id, i.film_id, i.store_id
FROM rental r
INNER JOIN inventory i ON r.inventory_id = i.inventory_id
WHERE r.staff_id = 1
LIMIT 10;

  ->  Merge Join  (cost=0.00..1477.10 rows=8254 width=12) (actual time=0.043..0.072 rows=10 loops=1)
        Merge Cond: (i.inventory_id = r.inventory_id)
        ->  Index Scan using inventory_pkey on inventory i  (cost=0.00..209.97 rows=4581 width=12) (actual time=0.009..0.009 rows=6 loops=1)
        ->  Index Scan using idx_fk_inventory_id on rental r  (cost=0.00..1152.51 rows=8254 width=8) (actual time=0.021..0.047 rows=10 loops=1)

root_causes.description: Optimizer chose Merge Join, not Nested Loop — already optimal join strategy
